description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a lush arrangement of trees and shrubs, providing a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, rectilinear design with large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front facade is accessible via a wide staircase leading up from the street, flanked by landscaped greenery. The property includes a driveway and a paved walkway, with the main entrance centrally located. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The backyard area appears to include a patio or pool, enhancing the outdoor living space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a central entrance and a spacious outdoor area.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, wide staircase, and dense landscaping framing the facade.
description_view_1: Top angled view reveals the flat roof, layout of rooms, and backyard patio or pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back facade, additional windows, and more secluded landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view displays the driveway, side windows, and the transition between front and back yards.
